channel.title: Moins.ui | UI/UX Product Designer Melbourne
channel.description: UI/UX & Product Designer for SaaS teams based in Melbourne, Australia

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Physical Wireframing before low fidelity screens

An oversized, frameless monitor showing a high-fidelity UI of a mobile app and web dashboard side-by-side, both in a crisp, modern interface with ample white space, soft blues, and charcoal typography. The screen sits on a slim, matte-black stand atop a pale wooden desk with rounded edges. Beside it, a tablet and smartphone display synchronized design screens. Cool, even studio lighting highlights the pixels and smooth textures, creating subtle reflections on the glass. Captured straight-on at eye level with a balanced, symmetrical composition and sharp focus throughout. The mood is precise and methodical, emphasizing systematic product thinking and cross-platform UI/UX design in a photographic, contemporary aesthetic.
High-fidelity UI of phone and web screens
A carefully arranged grid of printed product design case study boards
Dashboard design for a Organizing Product
Hero section for an Retail Website
Hero Section design of an AI Product
SaaS Dashboard UI Design Case Study
Background Image that suits the overall theme of the page
Hero section for an Retail Website
Hero Section design of an AI Product

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded: This is an example of a page. Unlike posts, which are displayed on your blog’s front page in the order they’re published, pages are better suited for more timeless content that you want to be easily accessible, like your About or Contact information. Click the Edit link to make changes to this page or add another page.

item.title: Fundamental Study
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded: Human and User-Centered Design (HCD/UCD) sits at the intersection of Ergonomics, Usability, UX, and Psychology — all united by one goal: making products better for people. A systematic review of 134 articles spanning 20 years reveals that while the field has grown significantly, particularly after 2006, most research remains fragmented. Studies either focus narrowly on digital products or present only partial design process models. No single structured method comprehensively guides practitioners through a full human-centered product development process, especially for physical products — exposing a critical gap the field has yet to fill.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Human and UserCentered Design Product Development

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded:
Design that feels effortless

I’m Moins, a UI/UX and product designer focused on reducing friction, clarifying complex flows, and aligning interfaces with real user needs.

Services

From end‑to‑end product discovery and UX strategy to interface design, design systems, and rapid prototyping, I help teams ship polished, user‑first digital products.

Explore services

Case Studies

Ideas on product thinking, UX craft, Learnings and interface clarity.

Learn More

Testimonials

Moins translated messy product requirements into a clean, intuitive interface that our users understood instantly.

— Lina

Thoughtful UX decisions, quick iterations, and clear communication made this redesign project smooth and surprisingly enjoyable.

— Marco

Our onboarding completion rate jumped dramatically after implementing Moins.ui’s prototypes and microcopy recommendations.

— Priya

Contact Us

Based In Melbourne, Australia

Hours: Monday–Friday 9–5

Phone: 00-000-000

item.title: Contact
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded:
Contact Moins.ui

Share your project idea, timeline, and goals so we can explore a focused, effective collaboration.

Find us:

221 Flinders Street, Melbourne, Victoria

Hours 9AM-5PM

Replies within 24 hours

Phone

000-00-000

Project Inquiry

Tell me about your product, users, budget, and timeline so I can respond with a clear next step.

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded:
Moins — UI/UX & Product Designer in Melbourne, Australia

About

A snapshot of my philosophy, process, and craft behind the product experiences I design.

Linkedin

Behance

Designing Products People Understand

I’m Moins, a product designer turning complex problems into clear, intuitive interfaces. I balance UX research, interaction design, and visual systems to ship thoughtful features. Explore in-depth case studies and shipped work on the work page.

View work

Toolkit

I combine discovery research, journey mapping, and UX writing with rapid prototyping in Figma, interactive design systems, and analytics-informed iteration to design products that scale reliably for teams, stakeholders, and the people who use them.

View skills

item.title: Work
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded:
Product Design

Case studies and experiments in crafting clear, modern interfaces that balance business goals with user needs.

About

Designing thoughtful digital products

I lead end-to-end product design—from research and UX strategy to interface design and prototyping—helping teams launch focused, measurable improvements. Explore the case studies, then reach out via the contact page to discuss your next project.

Contact me

Testimonials

Siddhi Bhalekar

Moins translated vague product goals into a clear UX vision that boosted activation by 32% within the first release cycle.

Maria Ballori

Their prototypes aligned our team fast—engineering, marketing, and support finally shared the same picture of the experience we were shipping.

J.Hope

Workshops with Moins reframed our onboarding flow around user intent, cutting support tickets in half after launch.

John Doe

From accessibility audits to microcopy, every detail felt intentional and on-brand, which made stakeholder sign-off refreshingly straightforward.

item.title: Case Studies
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded:
Articles

About

I'm Moins, a product designer crafting clear, modern interfaces that balance user needs and business goals. Explore case studies on design systems, onboarding, and SaaS UX that show my process from research to polished interaction design.

View work

item.title: Services
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded:
UI/UX & Product Design Services for SaaS Teams — Melbourne

Services

Discovery

Clarify user needs through audits, interviews, and insight synthesis before you commit to roadmaps or new features.

Product

Design intuitive end‑to‑end product journeys, from onboarding to empty states, with flows, wireframes, and high‑fidelity UI.

Systems

Document reusable patterns, tokens, and components in a lean design system your team can actually maintain.

Advisory

Partner on prioritization, experiments, and design critiques to keep your product experience cohesive as you scale.

Book a call

Let's talk about your Project

item.title: Case Study
item.dc:creator: milo90542
item.content:encoded: Gherardini, Renzi, and Leali (2016) developed a systematic user-centered framework tailored for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). Their method stood out for its structured, step-by-step approach — detailing each phase of the product development process and even incorporating decision-making equations to improve efficiency. It represented one of the most rigorous UCD frameworks identified in the review. However, its primary limitation was scope: the framework was designed around digital systems, leaving physical product teams with limited applicability. This case illustrates the broader pattern in the field — methodological sophistication exists, but rarely transfers cleanly across product types.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: %%title%% Case Study of Human and User Centered Design Product Development
